---
title: ""
format: html
---

# Genomic databases

There are many databases that hold information about genes. 

top most hihgly expressed genmes in upregulated

WIll need to go through a couple of upregualedt geens mostly and check their functions. check the bioconductor original lesson too, what did they doid - doesnt seem like they went gen by gen but htey did do GO. 

# Basic Local Alignment Search Tool (BLAST) 🚀


maybe does not need to be one story here. 
 genes and databases and blast


Take a few genes of interest and live blast them to see stuff 

sequence alignment impotant skill
idnetify intor exon also important
